choices.text: strategy.exit("Bracket", from_entry="Long", stop=slPrice, limit=tpPrice). Single call sets both; one fills cancels the other (OCO behavior).

questions.explanation: strategy.exit with stop + limit = OCO bracket.

choices.text: stopPrice = entry - ta.atr(14) * 2. ATR scales with volatility; tight in calm markets, wide in fast markets. Prevents getting stopped by normal noise.

questions.explanation: ATR-based stops adapt to market volatility.
